description: Phase 1: SalesOrderViewModel type defined (header fields, customer/tenant parties, line items, totals, currency)
Phase 1: mapDbSalesOrderToViewModel(knex, tenant, soId) loads sales_orders + sales_order_lines
Phase 1: adapter resolves customer party (client name + address from client_id and ship_to)
Phase 1: adapter resolves product/service name + SKU for each line (service_catalog)
Phase 1: adapter computes per-line amount (quantity_ordered x unit_price, integer cents)
Phase 1: adapter computes subtotal, tax, total
Phase 1: adapter resolves tenant party (company name/address/logo) for branding
Phase 1: SALES_ORDER_TEMPLATE_VALUE_BINDINGS defined (orderNumber, orderDate, expectedShipDate, customerName/Address, tenant party, clientPoNumber, subtotal/tax/total, notes)
Phase 1: SALES_ORDER_TEMPLATE_COLLECTION_BINDINGS defined (lineItems)
Phase 1: buildSalesOrderTemplateBindings() assembles value+collection bindings into AST bindings
Phase 1: buildStandardSalesOrderConfirmationAst() returns a valid confirmation TemplateAst (header, parties, line table, totals, branding)
Phase 1: getStandardSalesOrderTemplateAstByCode(code) lookup returns a cloned standard AST
Phase 1: resolveSalesOrderTemplateAst() stub returns the standard confirmation AST (no DB)
Phase 1: getSalesOrderHtml() renders SO -> HTML via evaluateTemplateAst + renderTemplateAstHtmlDocument
Phase 1: generatePDF() handles a salesOrderId branch -> PDF buffer via generatePDFBuffer
Phase 1: downloadSalesOrderPDF(soId) server action returns pdf bytes + filename
Phase 1: downloadSalesOrderPDF enforces permission (inventory/sales-order read)
Phase 1: Download action wired on the Sales Orders screen (resolve inventory->billing dependency direction: direct import vs API route)
Phase 1: confirmation content correct — order number, dates, customer, each line (name+qty+amount), subtotal/total, branding
Phase 1: error handling — SO not found / no lines -> clear message, no PDF
Phase 1: error handling — evaluate/render throws -> 'Couldn't generate the document' + log
Phase 2: generic document_templates table (document_type-keyed) + migration
Phase 2: generic standard_document_templates table (document_type-keyed) + migration
Phase 2: generic document_template_assignments table (document_type-keyed) + migration
Phase 2: documentRegistry — type -> { label, bindings, standardTemplates, viewModelBuilder, sampleData, codePrefix }
Phase 2: register 'sales-order' in the registry (its Phase-1 artifacts)
Phase 2: generic getDocumentTemplates(type) action
Phase 2: generic saveDocumentTemplate(type, ...) action
Phase 2: generic setDefaultDocumentTemplate(type, ...) action
Phase 2: generic deleteDocumentTemplate(type, ...) action
Phase 2: runAuthoritativeTemplatePreview(type, ...) action (sample-data preview)
Phase 2: resolveDocumentTemplateAst(type, entity) — client override -> tenant default -> standard
Phase 2: replace P1 stub with registry-backed resolveSalesOrderTemplateAst
Phase 2: generic management route /msp/document-templates/[type]
Phase 2: management page lists/clones/edits/deletes templates for a type
Phase 2: editor embeds DesignerShell + preview for a type
Phase 2: extend DesignerDocumentKind + resolveDesignerDocumentKind with 'sales-order'
Phase 2: seed standard SO confirmation template into standard_document_templates
Phase 3: client-level template override resolution
Phase 3: detailed / by-location standard confirmation variant
Phase 3: drop-ship vs from-stock line nuances in the document
Phase 3: packing slip document type (registered)
Phase 3: pick list document type (registered)
Phase 3: auto-attach confirmation to SO emails
